description: On boot, Jarvis ran identity files, calendar pull, and lead review but did not execute the full chief-morning workflow, which includes parallel dispatch of Knox for Plaud transcript sync, Knox for reMarkable sync, and Rigby for release watch. The chief-morning skill explicitly documents these as boot-time parallel dispatches. Jarvis improvised a partial briefing instead of running the established workflow.
correction: Boot means running the full chief-morning workflow, not a subset. The parallel boot dispatch (Plaud sync, reMarkable sync, release watch) should fire immediately alongside calendar/email/task gathering.
systemic_fix: On 'boot up' or session start: (1) read identity files, (2) immediately dispatch the chief-morning skill which handles the full boot sequence including parallel sub-agent launches. Don't hand-roll a partial briefing.
